feed.title: State of the transaction privacy work in Bitcoin

entry.title: State of the transaction privacy work in Bitcoin
entry.summary: Physical devices such as Opendime and Satscard enable the offline transfer of Bitcoin, similar to how cash transactions are conducted. These tools are significant although they are not protocols themselves. They provide an essential function in the cryptocurrency ecosystem by facilitating secure and direct transfers without the need for online connectivity. For more information on these devices, you can visit their respective websites: [Opendime](https://opendime.com/) and [Satscard](https://satscard.com/). This feature is particularly useful for users who prioritize privacy and those who do not have constant access to a reliable internet connection, thus broadening the accessibility and utility of Bitcoin.
